nodes.label: Retail Customer
nodes.description: Individual banking customer accessing via web and mobile

nodes.label: Corporate Client
nodes.description: Business client using treasury and bulk-payment APIs

nodes.label: Bank Operator
nodes.description: Internal staff managing operations and support

nodes.label: Core Banking Platform
nodes.description: Central microservices platform — all banking domain logic

nodes.label: Access & Security
nodes.description: API gateway, authentication and authorisation for all inbound traffic

nodes.label: API Gateway
nodes.description: Routes all external traffic, enforces rate limits and TLS termination

nodes.label: Auth Service
nodes.description: Issues JWT tokens and validates OIDC sessions

nodes.label: Banking Services
nodes.description: Core financial domain — payments, accounts and event streaming

nodes.label: Payments Service
nodes.description: Processes domestic and cross-border payment instructions

nodes.label: Payment Validator
nodes.description: Validates payment rules, limits and IBAN format

nodes.label: FX Engine
nodes.description: Applies real-time FX rates for cross-border payments

nodes.label: Accounts Service
nodes.description: Manages customer accounts, balances and statements

nodes.label: Event Bus
nodes.description: Async domain-event streaming between all microservices

nodes.label: Risk & Data
nodes.description: Real-time fraud detection and persistent data stores

nodes.label: Fraud Detection
nodes.description: Real-time ML-based transaction risk scoring

nodes.label: Accounts DB
nodes.description: Primary store for customer and account data

nodes.label: Transactions DB
nodes.description: Immutable append-only ledger of all financial transactions

nodes.label: Digital Channels
nodes.description: Customer-facing web portal and native mobile app

nodes.label: Web Banking
nodes.description: Full-featured banking portal for browsers

nodes.label: Mobile App
nodes.description: Native banking app for iOS and Android

nodes.label: SWIFT Network
nodes.description: International wire transfer messaging

nodes.label: Card Networks
nodes.description: Visa / Mastercard authorisation

nodes.label: KYC / AML Provider
nodes.description: Identity verification and AML screening
